recalls.Description: A recall has been issued for Aroeve air purifiers, specifically model MK04, available in black or white. These units, manufactured before July 2025, have serial numbers beginning with 'BN' and can be identified by the label located on the bottom of the device. Consumers should be aware that these air purifiers pose significant fire and burn hazards due to the risk of overheating and ignition.
recalls.Title: Aroeve Air Purifiers Recalled Due to Fire and Burn Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, reach out via email at Aroeve-airpure-recall@outlook.com, or visit https://aroeve.com/pages/product-recall-information or https://aroeve.com/ and select 'Product Recalls' at the top of the page.

Images.Caption: Recalled Aroeve MK04 Air Purifier in white
Recalled Aroeve MK04 Air Purifier in black
Product label with model, date code, and serial number

Injuries.Name: Airova received 37 reports of the air purifiers overheating, including one report of fire. No injuries or property damage have been reported.

Retailers.Name: Online at Amazon.com, Shopify.com, TEMU.com, and TikTok.com from September 2024 through June 2025 for between $80 and $134.

Hazards.Name: Fire and burn hazards due to overheating and ignition

Remedies.Name: Stop using the air purifiers and contact Airova for a free replacement

seo.metaDescription: A recall of Aroeve air purifiers due to fire and burn hazards. Check your model and contact for a free replacement.
